items.context: Email thread Apr 20-21: Fan committed to connecting Ashwin with 'my friend who leads AI investments and partnerships at Amex, and she is very interested.' Ashwin replied: 'Love to get connected to the Amex Team.'

items.context: Email from oliver@flowstate.inc on Apr 19 (forwarded by Jake Apr 20): Detailed inline Q&A responses on team, traction, business model, financing, and competitive moat. Original DD questions now answered.
